subtitle.registered: Welcome back. Explore what's new in Prosper or return to your dashboard.
subtitle.guest: Manage accounts in multiple currencies, create savings plans, analyze your spending, import receipts with OCR, and learn personal finance. All in one place.

items.label: 8 Currencies
items.desc: USD, BS, EUR, COP, USDT, SOL, BTC, USDC

productDemo.sectionDesc: Click the tabs to see how each section of the app looks.

tabs.label: Dashboard
tabs.title: Your financial overview at a glance
tabs.description: View income, expenses, monthly balance, goals in progress, and quick access to all your tools.

tabs.label: Finances
tabs.title: Total control of your accounts and transactions
tabs.description: Manage multiple currencies, record movements, transfer between accounts, and import receipts with OCR.

tabs.label: Goals
tabs.title: Financial plans you actually achieve
tabs.description: Create savings plans, planned expenses, and recurring payments. Share expenses and track visual progress.

tabs.label: Calendar
tabs.title: Never miss an important date again
tabs.description: View due dates, reminders, recurring payments, and plans with deadlines in a clear interface.

features.sectionTitle: Everything you need to grow financially
features.sectionDesc: Powerful tools designed to simplify your financial life.

items.title: Multi-Currency Account Management
items.description: Manage all your accounts in one place. Supports fiat currencies and cryptocurrencies with automatic conversion.

items.title: Financial Plans
items.description: Create savings plans, planned expenses, and recurring payments. Track your progress visually.

items.title: Visual Analytics
items.description: Interactive charts showing your income, expenses, and savings by period.
features: Charts by day, week, month, or year

items.title: Real-Time Rates
items.description: Official BCV rates for fiat currencies and Binance P2P for cryptocurrencies.
features: P2P for USDT, SOL, BTC, USDC
Official vs P2P mode per account

items.title: Smart Calendar
items.description: Organize reminders, payment dates, and deadlines for your financial plans.

items.title: VEPay OCR
items.description: Capture Venezuelan bank receipts and extract data automatically.

items.title: Expense Sharing
items.description: Split expenses with friends, family, or coworkers directly in the app.

tutorials.sectionTitle: Learn to use Prosper in minutes
tutorials.sectionDesc: Step-by-step guides to get the most out of every feature.

items.title: Your first account
steps: Sign up for free with Google or email in seconds.
Create your first account: wallet, bank, or currency.
Record income and expenses from the dashboard.

items.title: Create a savings plan
steps: Go to Financial Plans and choose Savings.
Set target amount, deadline, and frequency.
Track your visual progress and reach your goals.

items.title: Use VEPay OCR
steps: Take a screenshot of your bank payment.
Upload it in Finances → Import Screenshot.
Review extracted data and save the transaction.

items.title: Understand P2P rates
steps: When creating a crypto account (USDT, SOL, BTC, USDC) choose the mode.
Official uses CoinGecko · P2P uses real Binance price.
Switch modes from the dashboard in one click.

howItWorks.sectionDesc: No complicated setup. Click each step to explore.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.description: Sign up for free with Google or email. Choose your preferred currency and customize your profile in seconds.

steps.title: Add your accounts
steps.description: Create accounts in multiple currencies, record income and expenses. Everything syncs instantly in the cloud.

steps.title: Create plans and goals
steps.description: Set savings goals, planned expenses, and recurring payments. Visualize your progress day by day.

steps.title: Learn and grow
steps.description: Complete courses in the Academy, check the due date calendar, and make smart financial decisions.

testimonials.sectionDesc: Thousands of people already organize their finances with Prosper Pro.

items.name: Mariana R.
items.content: Prosper helped me organize my income in USD and BS. The real-time rates are accurate and the dashboard is super clear.

items.name: Carlos G.
items.content: VEPay OCR saves me hours every week. I upload my payment screenshots and Prosper extracts everything automatically.

items.name: Andrea P.
items.content: For the first time I have total control of my finances. The dashboard and savings plans changed my life.

items.name: Luis M.
items.content: Sharing expenses with my family has never been easier. Everyone sees their share and I have total control.

items.name: Sofía T.
items.content: I recommend Prosper to all my clients. The multi-currency and due date calendar are indispensable.

items.name: Daniel K.
items.content: The P2P mode for crypto is accurate. Compared to other apps, Prosper has the most updated market rates.

security.sectionDesc: We designed Prosper with privacy and security from day one.

items.title: Secure authentication
items.description: We use Firebase Authentication with support for Google Sign-In, email verification, and encrypted sessions.

items.title: Your data is yours alone
items.description: Each user has their own isolated space in Firestore. No one else can see your accounts, goals, or transactions.

items.title: Private profile by default
items.description: You can choose whether your profile is public or private. In private mode, you can only be found by exact email.

items.title: Encrypted connection
items.description: All communication between your browser and our servers uses HTTPS and TLS. Always.

items.title: Cloud backup
items.description: Your data syncs automatically to Firebase. If you switch devices, everything is there.

items.title: No ads or trackers
items.description: We don't sell your information. We don't show ads. We don't use third-party cookies.

faq.sectionDesc: Everything you need to know before you start.

items.a: Yes. Prosper Pro is 100% free, with no ads and no limits on accounts or transactions. You can use all features from day one.
We support fiat currencies (USD, BS, EUR, COP) and cryptocurrencies (USDT, SOL, BTC, USDC). You can also choose official or P2P rate for cryptos.
VEPay uses OCR to read screenshots from Venezuelan banking apps. It automatically extracts bank, amount, reference, date, and concept, creating a ready-to-save transaction.
Yes. Your data is stored in Firebase with secure authentication. Only you have access to your financial information.

items.q: Can I share expenses with other people?
items.a: Yes. In shared expense plans you can invite other users by email and split amounts. Each person receives notifications and can accept or reject requests.

items.q: Do I need a credit card to sign up?
items.a: No. You only need an email or a Google account. We don't ask for or store payment information.
